caption: A woman with dark hair is wearing a striped shirt and a black headset with a microphone. She is positioned in a room with light-colored walls and a light-colored curtain visible to her right. Throughout the clip, she is centered in the frame and appears to be speaking, with her mouth opening and closing across the sequence. A small, partially legible piece of on-screen text, "Henny Benny", is visible in the bottom-left corner of each frame. The setting remains static as the woman maintains her position, with only subtle changes in her facial expression and mouth movements as she talks. No other people or objects are present in the scene.
